queries.sql: SELECT `s`.`id`, `s`.`slug`, `s`.`title`, `s`.`short_note`, `s`.`image`, `s`.`sub_category`, `pc`.`category` as `parent_category`, `sc`.`category` as `sub_category_title`, `sc`.`description` as `category_description`, `sc`.`image` as `category_image` FROM `services` as `s` LEFT JOIN `categories` as `pc` ON `pc`.`id` = `s`.`category_id` LEFT JOIN `categories` as `sc` ON `sc`.`id` = `s`.`sub_category` WHERE `s`.`category_id` = '7' AND `s`.`status` = 1 ORDER BY `s`.`id` DESC

queries.hover: This query was called more than once.
